name: Ralph Wiggum Loop
description: Self-referential AI agent loop for iterative improvement - keeps the same prompt and lets the agent see its own work to continuously improve

stateDir.description: Directory to store loop state files

autoContinue.description: Automatically continue loop after agent ends

stateDir.label: State Directory
stateDir.help: Directory where loop state files are stored

autoContinue.label: Auto Continue
autoContinue.help: Automatically trigger next iteration after agent ends
